title: OTP Screen - Verify entering an incorrect OTP
description: Tests the system's response to an incorrect OTP entry.
preconditions: User is on the OTP screen.
User has received a valid OTP.

steps.description: 1. Enter a 4-digit OTP that is different from the one received.
2. Observe the screen after the 4th digit is entered.

expected_result: An 'Invalid OTP' error message is displayed. The OTP input fields are cleared, and the user can retry.
